summary: Issue #469 P2-9-7 catalog partition: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. A-2 search_all path with DAILY and POINT_IN_TIME strategies, active_products/new_products persistence, partition progress respect, optional budget attempt recording. Nine unit tests pass; MagicMock ProductsResource — no live Partner HTTP.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: MODULE.md documents catalog partition API, strategies, and A-2 snapshot limitation.
criticalFindings.suggestion: No action required — documentation matches module style.

criticalFindings.description: DAILY Active counts derive from current A-2 status (documented best-effort); historical listing status cannot be reconstructed — POINT_IN_TIME fallback available.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Coverage report (#471) should flag catalog_point_in_time grain when orchestrator selects fallback.

mappings.criterion: Fixture pytest: mixed status/create_time → expected Active/New counts for a given date
Pytest: uses A-2 search path, not A-3 get-by-id fan-out
Pytest: fallback mode path is explicit and testable (flag or strategy)
